title: Bubble Cliffs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bubble_Cliffs.jpg|thumb]]The '''"Bubble Cliffs"''' were a tourist site that was located in [[Nezmi]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiaxx]]. They were composed of a series of interconnected caves that formed as bubbles. The bubbles were each between five and thirty meters across, and served as shelters for Nezmi's early indigenous [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] population. These ancient dwellings were later restored according to archaeological evidence for historical purposes; the cliffs could be visited via daily [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] tours.

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the caves served as the secret headquarters of the [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] criminal organization.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 5]]
